source_intake_record.raw_question_text: A whistle of frequency 540 Hz rotates in a circle of radius 2 m at an angular speed of 15.0 rad/s. What are the maximum frequency heard by a listener, standing at a long distance away at rest from the centre of the circle (sound velocity= 330 m/s).
